message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor TaskControl
participant Reins_Agent
participant ExecCommands
database HostRegistry

loop all_clients
    TaskControl -> Reins_Agent : [01] identified_key

    group connection check
        Reins_Agent -> ExecCommands : [02] check(identified_key)
        ExecCommands -> ExecCommands : [03] varid?(identified_key)
        Reins_Agent <-- ExecCommands : [04] status
        destroy ExecCommands
    end

    TaskControl <.. Reins_Agent : [05] status

    group logging status
        TaskControl -> ExecCommands : [06] rewrite_status(identified_key, status)
        ExecCommands -> HostRegistry : [07] set_status(identified_key, IPaddress, status)
        ExecCommands <-- HostRegistry : [08] store()
        TaskControl <.. ExecCommands : [09] true or false
    end
end

@enduml
```
